signals.headline: US–Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | **YES** | **MED** confidence
signals.raw:
US–Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | **YES** | **MED** confidence

Markets reacted positively to the extension of the US-Iran ceasefire announced today, with Wall Street indices rising as reported in economic updates, potentially easing energy-driven inflation pressures from the prior war spike (oil from $71 to $103/barrel in March).[1][3]

This development could move prediction markets

signals.headline: ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Highest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Highest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs posted over $275 million in weekly inflows—the strongest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to nearly $2,400 and total crypto market cap rising 4% to $2.6 trillion[2].
